_meta.name: English
_meta.note: Master source. Other locales are generated by dev/i18n_translate.py via NLLB-200. Edit only this file; regenerate the rest.

login.subtitle: Enter your device token to access
login.find_hint: Find this in your OverDrive app → Dashboard → Access Code
login.privacy: Your data stays on your device.

notif.origin_banner: Push notifications require Zrok or a reverse proxy. Cloudflare quick tunnels change every restart and would invalidate every subscription. Tailscale serves over plain HTTP and can't be used for Web Push unless using a reverse proxy. Open the dashboard from your reserved Zrok or reverse proxy URL on your phone, Add to Home Screen, then return here to enable.
notif.backend_banner: Notifications backend not initialized. Reserve a Zrok URL via the daemons screen and restart the daemon to enable push delivery.
notif.push_delivery_sub: Enables alerts on the device you are currently using. Each phone you install the dashboard onto needs to be enabled here once.
notif.categories_sub: Toggle which kinds of alerts are pushed to this device. Each category fires when the head unit detects the matching event; what triggers it depends on the related daemon's settings.
notif.devices_sub: Every phone that enabled push notifications appears here. Use Remove to deregister a device. Disable on this device above also unsubscribes the current browser locally, while Remove is server-side only.
notif.perm_zrok_required: Push delivery requires Zrok or a reverse proxy — see banner above.
notif.perm_unsupported: Notifications not supported in this browser
notif.perm_unsupported_install: Notifications not supported. If using Safari, try adding to home screen to get notifications
notif.perm_granted: Notifications are enabled on this device
notif.perm_denied: Notifications are blocked. Enable in browser settings.
notif.enable_first: Enable notifications on this device first.
notif.pwa_not_loaded: PWA bootstrap not loaded — install to home screen first.
notif.enable_success: Push notifications enabled on this device.
notif.sev_critical: Critical: drop-everything alert — sticky banner, longer vibrate, ignores quiet hours.
notif.sev_warn: Warn: short vibrate, standard banner — something to look at soon.
notif.sev_auto: Auto: severity is decided per-event from the data (slow leak → warn, fast leak → critical).
notif.sev_info: Info: silent banner, no vibrate — reserved for confirmations.

tier_desc.excellent: Outstanding driving habits. You maximize regen, maintain smooth pedal inputs, and keep consistent speeds.
tier_desc.good: Solid driving with room to grow. Occasional hard braking or speed fluctuations bring the score down.
tier_desc.average: Moderate efficiency. Frequent speed changes or inconsistent pedal use are costing you range.
tier_desc.poor: Aggressive patterns detected. Heavy acceleration and late braking are significantly reducing your range.

trip.drive_more_for_tips: 💡 Drive more trips to get personalized improvement suggestions.

anticipation.label: Anticipation
anticipation.desc: How well you read traffic ahead and lift off the accelerator early before braking.
anticipation.tip: Coast more before red lights. Lift off the pedal 3–5 seconds earlier than usual.

smoothness.label: Smoothness
smoothness.desc: How gradually you apply and release the accelerator and brake pedals.
smoothness.tip: Pretend there's a glass of water on the dashboard. Smooth transitions keep it steady.

speed_discipline.label: Speed Discipline
speed_discipline.desc: How consistently you maintain appropriate speeds without frequent speeding.
speed_discipline.tip: Use cruise control on highways. Staying within {limit} of the limit saves energy.

efficiency.label: Efficiency
efficiency.desc: Your energy consumption per km compared to the optimal baseline for your vehicle, route terrain, and conditions.
efficiency.tip: Pre-condition the cabin while plugged in. Scores adjust for terrain — hills won't penalize you unfairly.

consistency.label: Consistency
consistency.desc: How uniform your driving style is throughout the trip. Erratic behavior lowers this.
consistency.tip: Pick a driving style and stick with it. Consistent habits build muscle memory.

trip.no_trips_hint: Enable trip analytics and start driving to see your trips here

card.score_tooltip: Your overall driving efficiency score based on 5 criteria: anticipation, smoothness, speed discipline, efficiency, and consistency.
card.score_tip: 💡 Focus on your weakest category to see the biggest improvement.

settings.title: Trip Analytics
settings.auto_record: Automatically record trips and compute driving scores
settings.rate_help: Cost per kWh for trip cost calculation
settings.distance_unit_desc: Display distances and speeds in km or miles
settings.storage_location_desc: Choose where to save trip telemetry

cdr.delete_confirm: Delete old BYD dashcam files to free space?
cdr.title: BYD Dashcam Auto-Cleanup
cdr.auto_delete_desc: Free up SD card space by removing oldest BYD dashcam recordings
cdr.recommend_text: Overdrive uses SD — enable cleanup to keep space free
cdr.reserved_desc: Keep this much free on SD card
cdr.protect_recent_desc: Don't delete dashcam files newer than this
cdr.min_keep_desc: Always keep at least this many newest files

scores.anticipation_text: Measures how well you read traffic ahead and lift off the accelerator early before braking. Higher scores mean less energy wasted on sudden stops.
scores.anticipation_tip: 💡 Tip: Coast more before red lights and slow traffic. Lift off the pedal 3–5 seconds earlier than usual.
scores.smoothness_text: Tracks how gradually you apply and release the accelerator and brake pedals. Jerky inputs waste energy and reduce comfort.
scores.smoothness_tip: 💡 Tip: Pretend there's a glass of water on the dashboard. Smooth pedal transitions keep it from spilling.
scores.speed_disc_text: Evaluates how consistently you maintain appropriate speeds. Frequent speeding and large speed variations reduce this score.
scores.speed_disc_tip: 💡 Tip: Use cruise control on highways. Keeping within 5 km/h of the limit saves significant energy.
scores.efficiency_text: Compares your energy consumption per km against the optimal baseline for your vehicle, route, and conditions.
scores.efficiency_tip: 💡 Tip: Pre-condition the cabin while plugged in. Avoid full-throttle launches from stops.
scores.consistency_text: Measures how uniform your driving style is throughout the trip. Erratic behavior (alternating aggressive and calm) lowers this score.
scores.consistency_tip: 💡 Tip: Pick a driving style and stick with it. Consistent habits build muscle memory for efficiency.

trip.unlock_range: Drive more trips to unlock personalized range estimates
trip.cost_hint: 💡 Set your electricity rate in Trip Storage → Electricity Rate
trip.delete_confirm: Delete this trip? This cannot be undone.
trip.aggressive_warning: Aggressive patterns detected. Heavy acceleration and late braking are significantly reducing your range.
trip.drive_more_unlock: Drive more trips to unlock personalized range
trip.range_based_on: Based on {count} trips in similar conditions

recording.h265_next_recording: H.265 will apply on next recording
recording.fps_next_acc_on: FPS change takes effect on next ACC ON
recording.bitrate_desc: Lower = smaller files, Higher = better quality
recording.camera_fps_desc: Frame rate for recording & surveillance. Takes effect on next ACC ON.
recording.cdr_auto_delete_desc: Free up SD card space by removing oldest BYD dashcam recordings
recording.cdr_min_keep_desc: Always keep at least this many newest files
recording.cdr_protect_recent_desc: Don't delete dashcam files newer than this
recording.cdr_recommend_text: Overdrive uses SD — enable cleanup to keep space free
recording.cdr_reserved_desc: Keep this much free on SD card
recording.mode_continuous_desc: Record all the time when cameras are active
recording.mode_none_desc: No recording - saves battery and resources
recording.mode_proximity_desc: Record when objects approach the vehicle
recording.select_mode_desc: Choose when to record while driving
recording.streaming_quality_desc: Quality for live view (lower = less bandwidth)
recording.telemetry_show_desc: Overlay speed, gear, pedals and timestamp on recorded video
recording.timeline_note: ℹ️ Recording continues if radar triggers again within post-buffer time

events.empty_failed_text: Check your connection and try again
events.empty_none_text: Recordings will appear here when available

confirm_delete_n.one: Delete {count} recording? This cannot be undone.
confirm_delete_n.other: Delete {count} recordings? This cannot be undone.

surveillance.fps_set: Camera FPS set to {fps} — takes effect on next ACC OFF
surveillance.confirm_clear_byd_creds:
Clear BYD Cloud credentials?

Deterrent actions (flash lights, horn) will stop working until you set up again.
surveillance.enable_desc: Monitor cameras for motion and object detection
surveillance.safe_desc: Camera won't start when parked here
surveillance.env_desc: Quick preset for your parking situation
surveillance.det_zone_desc: How far from the car motion triggers an alert
surveillance.custom_config: Custom configuration — select a preset to reset to recommended values.

distance.1_hint: Near — only detects large/close objects (cars, groups)
distance.2_hint: Close — good for parking lots, detects people nearby
distance.3_hint: Balanced — detects people up to ~8m away
distance.4_hint: Far — catches distant movement, may include passersby
distance.5_hint: Very Far — maximum range, use in quiet areas

sens.1_hint: Strict — large objects only (car/group), ignores single walkers
sens.2_hint: Conservative — solid objects, good for windy conditions
sens.3_hint: Balanced — triggers on walking people, ignores bugs/leaves
sens.4_hint: Sensitive — catches motion immediately on block entry
sens.5_hint: Aggressive — triggers on any motion, use indoors/garages only

v2_sens_hint.1: Only detects large, close movement like someone touching the car.
v2_sens_hint.2: Detects solid objects nearby. Good for windy conditions.
v2_sens_hint.3: Balanced — detects a person approaching within about 3 meters.
v2_sens_hint.4: Sensitive — catches motion quickly, good for people at distance.
v2_sens_hint.5: Maximum — detects any movement in the camera view. May increase false alerts.

env_hint.outdoor: Standard filtering for open parking lots and driveways. Handles sun, clouds, and headlights.
env_hint.garage: Aggressive light filtering for indoor parking. Ignores fluorescent flicker and reflections.
env_hint.street: Tuned for busy areas with foot traffic. Longer loitering time to ignore passersby.

zone_hint.close: Only triggers when someone is right next to the car (~1.5m).
zone_hint.normal: Standard detection range (~3m around the car).
zone_hint.extended: Detects activity further out (~5m+). May pick up more passing traffic.

shadow_hint.0: Shadow filtering disabled. May cause false recordings from tree shadows and cloud movement.
shadow_hint.1: Light filtering — catches obvious shadows. Good for garages with fluorescent lights.
shadow_hint.2: Balanced filtering — catches most tree shadows while preserving real motion detection.
shadow_hint.3: Aggressive filtering — maximum shadow rejection. Use when parked under trees with heavy wind.

surveillance.byd_pwd_keep: Leave blank to keep current password
surveillance.byd_pin_keep: Leave blank to keep current PIN
surveillance.byd_pin_hint: The 4-6 digit PIN you set in the official BYD app
surveillance.byd_pwd_pin_required: Password and control PIN are required for first setup
surveillance.byd_request_long: Request is taking long... checking status in a moment
surveillance.byd_test_sent: ✓ Flash command sent — check your car!
surveillance.byd_test_check_car: Command may have been sent — check your car
surveillance.loitering_time_desc: How long someone must stay near the car before recording starts
surveillance.loitering_time_hint: Higher values ignore people just walking past. Lower values are more responsive.
surveillance.shadow_filter_desc: Filters out tree shadows, cloud shadows, and other lighting changes that cause false recordings
surveillance.camera_controls_desc: Enable or disable detection per camera
surveillance.camera_controls_hint: Disable cameras facing a wall or busy road to reduce false alerts.
surveillance.detect_objects_desc: AI identifies what triggered the motion
surveillance.detect_objects_hint: Select which objects YOLO AI should identify. Motion detection triggers regardless — AI classifies what was detected.
surveillance.telegram_two_stage_desc: Send a quick "recording started" message, then the photo when it ends. Off by default — the photo alone is usually enough.
surveillance.motion_heatmap_desc: Overlay motion detection zones on stream
surveillance.motion_heatmap_title: Shows colored blocks on the live stream indicating where motion is detected.
surveillance.filter_debug_log_title: Logs detailed filter decisions for each detection.
surveillance.detection_zones_hint: Limit motion detection to specific areas of each camera. When off, the full camera frame is used for detection.
surveillance.roi_enable_desc: Draw a detection zone for this camera
surveillance.schedule_enable_desc: Only activate sentry during specific days and hours
surveillance.schedule_hint: Add time windows when surveillance should be active. Outside these windows, sentry mode won't start even if ACC is off.
surveillance.deterrent_on_motion_desc: What should OverDrive do when a threat is confirmed
surveillance.deterrent_hint: Flash Lights and Horn + Lights use BYD's cloud API. The command bounces off BYD's servers to the car's T-Box. Requires BYD Cloud account setup below.
surveillance.deterrent_warning: BYD Cloud account not configured. Set up your credentials below to enable cloud deterrents.
surveillance.byd_cloud_hint: Connect your BYD app account to enable remote commands (door lock, flash lights, horn). Only derived key hashes are stored — your raw password is never saved.
surveillance.byd_region_desc: Must match the region your BYD account was registered in. If unsure, try Europe (EU) first — it's the default for most overseas accounts.
surveillance.byd_cloud_merge_desc: SOC, charging, and temperature from BYD cloud — may be more accurate when parked
surveillance.storage_location_desc: Choose where to save surveillance events
surveillance.camera_fps_desc: Shared with recording. Takes effect on next ACC OFF.

mqtt.empty_p: No MQTT connections configured. Add a connection to start publishing vehicle telemetry.
mqtt.tailscale_hint: For private brokers on your tailnet: enable Tailscale proxy in the tailscale daemon settings to connect without port forwarding. Note: while enabled, public brokers will not be reachable.
mqtt.adaptive_desc: Publish slower when vehicle is parked
mqtt.retain_desc: Broker keeps last message for new subscribers

abrp.enable_desc: Send live vehicle data to A Better Route Planner

performance.confirm_reset_soh:
Reset SOH estimation?

This clears all SOH data and forces re-estimation from scratch.

Use if battery was replaced or reading seems incorrect.
performance.soh_reset_toast: SOH estimation reset — will recalculate from next data
performance.select_one_category: Select at least one category to reset.
performance.confirm_reset_categories:
Reset the following? This cannot be undone.

{list}
performance.chart_hint: Touch or hover to see values
performance.gpu_hint_overloaded: ⚠️ GPU stuck at {pct}% — Not oscillating. System may be overloaded or thermal throttling.
performance.gpu_hint_healthy: ✓ Oscillation is normal! GPU boosts to {pct}% for frames, then idles. This "race to idle" pattern saves battery.
performance.gpu_hint_heavy: {pct}% at {freq} MHz — Monitor for heat and battery drain.
performance.soh_no_estimate: ⚠ No SOH estimate yet — waiting for data from any source.
performance.soh_pinned_to: 📌 Pinned to {source} source. Switch to Auto for EMA-blended value.
performance.soh_source_caption: SOH Source (used by ABRP, Trips, MQTT, Range)
performance.cat_trips_desc: Trip history, routes, weekly/monthly rollups, consumption buckets
performance.cat_soc_history_desc: All SOC samples, charging sessions and battery voltage logs
performance.cat_soh_desc: Re-detects nominal capacity and re-seeds estimate from BMS
performance.cat_byd_cloud_desc: Username, login key, VIN, region — re-login required
performance.cat_recordings_desc: Deletes every MP4 in the recordings folder
performance.cat_sentry_events_desc: Surveillance event clips and JSON sidecars
performance.cat_trip_telemetry_desc: Per-trip JSON telemetry on disk (DB rows handled by Trips above)
performance.soc_will_appear: SOC history will appear once data is collected

update.headunit_installing: The head unit is installing the update. This page will refresh automatically when the new version is online.
update.waiting_for_headunit: Installing — waiting for head unit to come back…
update.version_unchanged: Daemon back online but version unchanged — install may have failed.
update.cannot_reach_headunit: Could not reach head unit. On a tunnel? Check Telegram for the new URL, or use the local IP.
update.rotation_warning: Your cloudflared link will change. The new URL will be sent to Telegram with the version number — check your chat after the update.
update.tunnel_stable: Your {type} URL is stable and will not change.
update.lan_hint: Local network access ({ips}) recovers ~{seconds}s faster than the tunnel — switch to it now if you can.
update.recommend_inapp_default: BYD clears the auto-start whitelist on every install. The in-car app prompts you; the webapp can't.
update.recommend_inapp_intro: Recommended: update from the in-car app instead. {reason}
update.downtime_warning: Remote access offline for ~{minutes} min. Daemons restart and the tunnel reconnects after install.

vehicle.cloud_required_text: This action requires a connected BYD Cloud account. Go to Surveillance Settings to link your credentials.
vehicle.model_load_failed: Model not found. Tap Retry to try again.

roi.add_time_window: Add a time window, then Save.

stream.idle_hint: Tap a camera on the car below
